markdown:
#  Update and Set Up DocuSign® on an Owner Invoice 
##  Background 
If you have a DocuSign® account, you are able to track the status of a signed document in Procore.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * You must be an [invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators).
  * **Requirements:**
    * The signature initiator in Procore must have an active DocuSign® account. See [How do I get a DocuSign® account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account) and [Do project owners and subcontractors need a DocuSign® account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Once you have signed in to DocuSign® through Procore, you will not need to sign in again.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the DocuSign® Integration on Your Company's Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/enable-the-docusign-integration-on-your-companys-procore-account)
  * [Enable or Disable the DocuSign® Integration on a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project)
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Under the **Owner** tab, select the prime contract that you want to work with.
  3. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. Click **Edit** next to the Invoice you want to update to use DocuSign® with.
  5. Click the **Update and Set Up DocuSign** button.  
![Pay App Docusign](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f747844530f5643b9132bc504d7caead/82c072e16c60a5e345cadd9b329e55e0/pay-app-docusign.png?fm=webp)
  6. If you have not logged into DocuSign® from Procore before, complete the following steps:
    1. Enter your DocuSign® email address.  
![Docusign Login](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d4a1aa06c7f594ad731442dea6eb36b8/65e171d760305bec0458eb81e9bde63e/docusign-login.png?fm=webp)
    2. Click **Continue**.
    3. Enter your password.
    4. Click **Log In**.
  7. Once you are in DocuSign®, Procore's contract PDF will pre-populate as a document in DocuSign®, or you can choose to add your own document.
  8. Upload documents by choosing one of these options:
     * Upload
     * Use a Template
     * Get From Cloud
  9. If you are not using a custom form, DocuSign® automatically completes the recipients for you. If you choose to use these recipients, DocuSign® also places the signing tags in the correct position.  
![Docusign Payapp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0ff109cfb34e016e7e21ae527822c0c7/1c547c682ea22dde9f39b4eb9efe502d/docusign-payapp.png?fm=webp)
  10. Click **Send** to send the document for signature.  
![Payapp Docusign2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f65b36a144386e97dc67c87fca469679/5cf33969145dc647a52102caf4c10192/payapp-docusign2.png?fm=webp)


## See Also
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice on Behalf of an Invoice Contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/create-an-invoice-on-behalf-of-an-invoice-contact)
  * [How does Procore automatically complete amounts on an upstream invoice? (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-automatically-complete-amounts-on-an-upstream-invoice)
  * [Compile Subcontractor Invoice Backups with the Invoicing Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/compile-subcontractor-invoice-backups-with-the-invoicing-tool)
title: Update and Set Up DocuSign® on an Owner Invoice
description: To update and set up DocuSign® on an owner invoice.
